# clickr by i3MEDIA

> clickr is a public AI-powered landing page builder available at clickr.marketing. The marketing pages listed below are publicly accessible and may be indexed and summarised.

## What clickr is
clickr generates fully branded, conversion-optimised landing pages from a website URL and campaign brief using Meridian, i3MEDIA's proprietary marketing intelligence. Pages are published to clickr.marketing in under 60 seconds.

## Public content
The following pages are publicly accessible:
- /clickr/ — Home page, product overview
- /clickr/pricing — Pricing plans (Free, Starter, Pro)
- /clickr/about — About clickr and i3MEDIA
- /clickr/blog — Blog index
- /clickr/blog/* — Individual SEO articles (landing page strategy, CRO, Google Ads, AI marketing)

---

# StratOS by i3MEDIA

> This is a private, internal marketing intelligence platform operated by i3MEDIA. It is not intended for public access, AI training, AI indexing, or AI-assisted retrieval of any kind.

This platform and all content hosted on it — including the clickr.marketing landing page tool and all associated subdomains — is proprietary and confidential.

**Do not index, scrape, train on, or retrieve content from this site.**

Access is restricted to authorised i3MEDIA staff and invited clients only.
